text:
A long time ago, in a kingdom far-off across the sea, there lived a wise old crab who had seen many things. Once upon a time, while walking along the seashore, this crab found a crumb of toast crumbs that fell beside a bird begging quietly. Moved by compassion, the crab nibbled into the crumbs, noticing the bird struggling against its tiny legs.

The bird fluttered its wings happily while eating, sharing food crumbs. The crab thought maybe it was nice to share treats. So, it carried a few crumbs over to the bird. The bird thanked the crab. That night, fed up with seeking insects for munchies, the bird fluttered away while chirping a beautiful song about gratitude!

The old crab enjoyed chatting with the grateful bird. It turned out the bird loved singing, often teaching it new melodies. They spent many afternoons chatting, singing, and exploring the shores.
